nodes.name: 白头沼泽霸鹟
nodes.summary: 白头沼泽霸鹟（White-headed marsh tyrant，学名 Arundinicola leucocephala），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 白头沼泽霸鹟（学名：Arundinicola leucocephala），是雀形目霸鹟科的一种鸟类，属于单型的白头沼泽霸鹟属（学名：Arundinicola）。 特征 白头沼泽霸鹟体重约13.8克，翼长约60.1毫米，喙宽度约5.8毫米，喙厚度约5毫米，嘴峰长约17毫米，跗蹠长…

links.key: bird-白头沼泽霸鹟-1e317a21__distributed_in__loc-南美洲国家和地区列表-a267b3e2
links.target: loc-南美洲国家和地区列表-a267b3e2
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species is native to several South American countries, including Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, Trinidad and Tobago, and Venezuela. As its name suggests, these tyrants inhabit wetlands in tropical regions, including marshes, bogs, swamps, fens, peatlands, rivers, streams, creeks, and moist savannas. Additionally, many of the previously mentioned countries, such as Brazil, Colombia, Peru, Ecuador, and Paraguay, dedicate a substantial amount of land to rice production
